title: eryngium fluitans
intro: Eryngium fluitans, also known as flowering sea holly, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae, native to Europe, Asia, and Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Eryngium fluitans include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
